_SECURITY_WARNING: 🚨 REPLACE ALL PLACEHOLDER VALUES BEFORE USE 🚨
_VALIDATION_REQUIRED: proxmox.host - Replace with your actual Proxmox server
auth.user - Use dedicated service account (not root)
_PRODUCTION_CHECKLIST: Review OAuth scopes for least privilege

proxmox._security_note: ⚠️ ALWAYS use verify_ssl: true in production

_security_notes: ⚠️ Use descriptive token names with dates
⚠️ Set token expiration dates in Proxmox
⚠️ For HTTP mode: bind to 127.0.0.1 or specific IP

_security_warnings: ⚠️ Use HTTPS only for issuer URL
⚠️ Minimize scopes to required permissions only
⚠️ Disable dynamic client registration in production
⚠️ Set short token expiry (1-4 hours maximum)

_VALIDATION_SCRIPT: Run: python -c "import json; c=json.load(open('config.json')); exit(1 if any('CHANGE-THIS' in str(v) for v in json.dumps(c)) else 0)" to check for placeholders
